name: Ice Diamond Pawn Shop
description_short: Ice Diamond Pawn Shop is a pawn operation located in Hamtramck, MI, offering collateral-based loans against jewelry, valuables, and personal items.
description_long: Ice Diamond Pawn Shop operates as a traditional pawn retailer in Hamtramck, Michigan, serving the local community with collateral-based lending services. Based on the business listing information available, the shop is positioned as a pawn operation, though detailed service descriptions are limited in the source data. Pawn shops like Ice Diamond provide an alternative lending model where customers can exchange personal items—typically jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, or other valuables—for immediate cash without requiring credit checks or traditional loan applications. The business maintains consistent operating hours throughout the week (10:00 AM to 6:30 PM, Monday through Saturday), indicating regular availability for customer transactions. What may distinguish Ice Diamond is its specific focus on diamond and jewelry-related assets, as suggested by its name, though the extent of specialization cannot be confirmed from the available website content. For consumers seeking fast cash without credit evaluation, pawn shops represent an accessible option, though borrowers should understand that failure to repay results in loss of the collateral rather than debt collection. The primary limitation of this profile is that detailed information about loan terms, interest rates, redemption policies, and the full range of accepted items is not available from the Waze listing provided.
pros: Consistent operating hours seven days a week (10:00 AM - 6:30 PM) for customer convenience
No credit check or application process required—fast access to cash
Local Hamtramck location with direct phone contact (313-256-1369) for immediate inquiries
Name suggests specialty focus on diamond and jewelry valuations
Pawn model avoids debt accumulation—collateral-based rather than loan-based
cons: Limited online presence; primary business information only available through Waze navigation listing
No published information on loan terms, interest rates, or redemption periods
Collateral is forfeited if loan is not repaid—customer loses the item permanently
No details available on accepted item categories, loan amount ranges, or valuation methodology
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash and willing to use personal items as collateral
People without established credit or access to traditional loans who need short-term funding
Individuals with jewelry or valuables seeking quick liquidation or temporary loans
diagnosis: Ice Diamond Pawn Shop is best for consumers in the Hamtramck area who need immediate cash and have jewelry or valuables to pledge as collateral, and who do not qualify for or prefer to avoid traditional credit products. The primary caveat is that unpaid loans result in permanent loss of the pledged item, and detailed terms and rates are not publicly available online—customers should call (313-256-1369 directly to understand specific loan parameters before transacting.
